name: KB Overhead Extension to Halo Pyramid
description: Pyramid-style kettlebell shoulder burnout: overhead tricep extension into a halo, adding one rep each round and switching halo direction. Great as a warm-up or finisher. Use a LIGHT bell — the overhead-to-halo transition can stress the rotator cuff if you go too heavy or too fast.
tips: Use a LIGHT kettlebell — this is shoulder mobility work, not a strength test
Go slow and controlled through the overhead-to-halo transition
Switch halo direction each round of the pyramid
Original video says 'do it until you can't' — 5 rounds is plenty, go higher if you want
Skip this if you have shoulder or rotator cuff issues
Works great as: warm-up before push day, finisher after upper body, or quick standalone KB session
